titleStmt.title: SII 22.137: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 137. (A.R. No. 137 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. PAR. RĀJARĀJADĒVA (II)—15th YEAR

summary.p: The details of date are given as Mīna, śu. 5, Monday, Mṛigaśīrsha which yield the equivalent A.D. 1160, March 14 for his 14th year. The inscription begins with the introduction Pūmaruviya Tirumādum etc. It records an endowment of a few plots of land with wells, trees and channels at Vikkachchimaṅgalam after purchasing the same from a private individual, by one Ēśanuḍaiyāṉ Uḍaiyāṉ Śūranāyakaṉ alias Nānūṟṟuva-Pallavaraiyaṉ of Tiruttuṟaiyūr for meeting the specified requirements of worship and offerings to god Ūrbāgaṅkoṉḍaruḷiya-Nāyānār at Iraiyānaraiyūr on five occasions viz., during the sacred bath and procession on the day of festival in the Paṅguṉi and Puraṭṭādi months and the sacred bath on the day of Tiruvādirai in Mārgaḻi. Mention is made of a hall called the Tāḻaṅkuṭṭa-tirtha-maṇḍapam where the deity was taken and offered worship.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pū maruviya tirumātum puvimātuñ jayamātum nāmaruvi
ya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayantu pulka Arumaṟaiviti neṟiyaṉaittum taḻai
ppa varumuṟai Urimaiyil maṇimuṭi cūṭit tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭai
t ticaikkaḷiṟeṭṭu n=taṅkutanikkū[ ṭan=tā] nena viḷaṅka karuṅkali
ppaṭṭiyaic ceṅkol turappa poruṅkatirāḻi puvivaḷantuṭan vara villavarira
ṭṭar minavar ciṅkaṇar pallavar nutaliyar pāttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpa maṇṇakam pu
ṇarntu cempon virasiṅhāsanattu puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya ko
pparakesaripatmarāṉa tribhuvanac cakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5vatu mina
nāyaṟṟup pūrvapakṣattu pañcamiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mṛgaśirṣatti nāḷ malā
ṭāṉa jaṉanātavaḷanāṭṭu pāṉūrkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam Iṟaiyāṉarai yūrāṉa śrī
coḻakeraḷacaturvedimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār Ūrpākaṅkoṇṭaruḷiṉa nāya ṉāṟku ti
ruttuṟaiyūr Ēcaṉuṭaiyān Uṭaiyān cūranāyakkanāna nānūṟṟuva pallavaraiyaṉ
nāyanārkku cantrādityavat cellakkaṭavatāka ceyta dhanmamāvatu tirup paṅkunittirunāḷ tiruve
ṭṭaikkum tirtthattukkum puraṭṭāti tirunāḷ tiruveṭṭaikkum tirtthat tukkum tirumārkaḻi tiruvātirai
tirtthattukkum Āka Ivai Añcukkum nāḷ Onṟukku tiruvamutu Ūrpākaṅ koṇṭān marakkālā
l Arici tūṇipatakkum kaṟiyamutu niṟai Onṟum Uppamutu Uriyum miḷakamutu Āḻākkum neyyamutu
Uriyum tayiramutu Irunāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku nāṟpatum Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu Onṟum Āka nāḷ
Añcukkarici Irukalaney tūṇippatakkum kaṟiyamutu niṟaiañcum Uppamutu Irunāḻi Uriyum miḷakamu
tu Uri Āḻākkum neyyamutu Irunāḻi Uriyum tayiramutu patināḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku Irunūṟum Ilai
amutu paṟṟu Añcum Āka Ittaṉaiyum tāḻaṅkuṭṭat tirtthamaṇṭapattile Amutuceytaruḷak kaṭava
tāka koṇṭuviṭṭa nilamāvatu Ivūr melpiṭākai vikkaccimaṅkalattu keḷvi cikkan śrīkaṇṭa
ṉ śrīkāri māṟaṉpakkal koṇṭa kāñcirañceyum kiṇaṟukaḷum nili peruñceyyil meṟkaṭai
ya pātiyum Innilattil nāṟukālkaḷum niṉmalaṉkālukku vaṭakku nattamum toṭṭam Ivai
yiccil kiṇaṟukaḷum payanmaraṅkaḷumāka Ittanaiyum Idharmam candrādittavaṟ cellakkaṭa
vatāka koṇṭu viṭṭān Eycanuṭaiyān Uṭaiyān cūranāyakanāna nānūṟṟuva pallavaraiyan
Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.137 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
